ui.create_your_own: Spread the Word: Create your own countdown
ui.create_desc: Design your custom countdown in seconds and start broadcasting now.
ui.ai_desc: Use Anti-Gravity with Nano Banana to create high-quality images from a simple text description. Perfect for ads, content, and visual identity.
ui.why_search: Why People Search for a Countdown
ui.personal_templates_desc: Choose a beautiful template for your personal celebration and customize it in seconds.

seo.quick_answer: There are precisely {days} days until {event} on {date}.
seo.desc_default: A live countdown tracking the exact days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until {event}.
seo.faq_2_q: How many days are left until {event}?
seo.faq_2_a: There are exactly {days} days remaining until {event}.
